title: Super Mario Bros.
description: Guide Mario through the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser in this groundbreaking side-scrolling platformer.

title: The Legend of Zelda
description: Explore a vast overworld and dangerous dungeons as Link to collect the Triforce pieces and rescue Princess Zelda.

title: Pac-Man
description: Chomp through a maze eating pellets while dodging colorful ghosts in the iconic arcade classic that defined a generation.

title: Tetris
description: Stack falling tetrominoes to clear lines and prevent the stack from reaching the top in this endlessly addictive puzzle game.

title: Street Fighter II
description: Choose from eight world warriors and battle opponents across the globe using special moves, combos, and fierce determination.

title: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: Race through colourful zones at blistering speed as Sonic, collecting rings and defeating the evil Dr. Robotnik.

title: Donkey Kong
description: Climb ladders and leap over barrels as Jumpman to rescue Pauline from the top of a steel-girder construction site.

title: Mega Man 2
description: Battle eight Robot Masters and steal their powers to defeat Dr. Wily in one of the most beloved NES action platformers.

title: Castlevania
description: Wield the Vampire Killer whip as Simon Belmont and storm Dracula's castle through six harrowing stages of monsters and traps.

title: Final Fantasy
description: Assemble a party of four Light Warriors, journey across a vast world, and restore the four elemental crystals to save civilisation.

title: Space Invaders
description: Defend Earth from descending waves of alien invaders using your laser cannon in the arcade game that launched a genre.

title: Contra
description: Battle through jungles, bases, and alien lairs solo or with a friend in this legendary side-scrolling run-and-gun shooter.
